title: Codex Mission
description: A spy mission to create a mini-app with Codex!

scenes.speech: Code Agent! Your mission is to develop an app with AI using Codex! 🕵️💻
scenes.title: Mission Briefing: Codex Operation
scenes.content: Your task: Use Codex (AI code assistant) to create a mini-app that changes a message when a button is pressed!

scenes.speech: Codex is an AI that 'writes code for you'! It can create any app you want!
scenes.title: What is Codex?
scenes.content: Codex is an amazing AI that writes code for you when you ask it to create an app!
scenes.highlight:
Codex features:
・Creates any program
・Provides explanations
・Answers questions
・Outputs working code

scenes.speech: First, let's define what you want to create in one sentence!
scenes.title: Requirements Definition Training
scenes.content: Before creating a program, clarify what you want to make. Keep it simple!
scenes.highlight:
Mission:
「Create a web page that changes
  the support message when a button is pressed」

Materials: HTML + CSS + JavaScript

scenes.speech: Let's copy and paste this prompt into Codex!
scenes.title: Operation Execution!
scenes.content: Open chatgpt.com and input the prompt below. Let's see what code comes out!
scenes.highlight:
Prompt:
「Create a children's support page with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
 When a button is pressed, display '_Ganbare!' and explain it clearly.

scenes.speech: Try changing the code a bit! Just change the color or message!
scenes.title: Customization Operation
scenes.content: Look at the code and change the message or color to your liking. Even one change is okay!
scenes.highlight:
Change:
・Message → Favorite word
・Button color → Favorite color
・Title → Original

scenes.title: When Errors Appear
scenes.content: Even Codex's code can throw errors. Read the 'red text', paste the last line back to Codex with 'fix this'. That's the fastest path.
scenes.highlight:
Error fix:
1. Read the red line
2. Paste to Codex
3. Say 'fix this'

scenes.title: Reading Code Practice
scenes.speech: Don't just lean on AI — read it yourself! 📖
scenes.content: Ask the AI 'what does this line do?' line by line. Once you can read it, the range of changes you can make explodes.
scenes.highlight:
Ways to ask:
- What does this line do?
- What if I delete it?
- Any other way to write it?

scenes.speech: Mission complete! Submit a screenshot of the working screen and get 420 points! 🎯
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: You've acquired the skill to create apps with AI! Submit a screenshot and your ideas on Slack!
